eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Faribault, MN; at 11:12 AM on OCT 9, 2019 Effective until 11:42 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test, this is only a Test from the Faribault county Sheriff's Office. This is a test, this is only a Test from the Faribault county Sheriff's Office.
